name: Wuxi Delinhai Environmental Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Wuxi Delinhai Environmental Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the cyanobacteria treatment technology business in China. It develops, sells, integrates, operates, and maintains cyanobacteria treatment equipment for the treatment of lake and reservoir cyanobacteria blooms; and the prevention and control of cyanobacteria blooms. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Wuxi, China.
